steps.title: Identify the advantage in the notes
steps.content: The student's goal is to explain an advantage of the format. The final bullet point provides the key signal: “The play was popular with audiences because the format allowed them to control the experience.” This identifies the specific advantage—not just what the format is, but why audiences valued it.

steps.title: Apply the advantage to the choices
steps.content: Choice C states directly that the format appealed to audiences because it allowed them to control the experience. This captures the exact advantage and rationale from the notes. Choices A, B, and D describe what the format includes or how it works, but none explain an advantage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
